title: Mailchimp vs Omnisend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp and Omnisend: pricing, features, ease of use, and which platform suits your business best.
h1: Mailchimp vs Omnisend: A Comprehensive Comparison
intro: Mailchimp and Omnisend are both freemium email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Mailchimp is ideal for small businesses and beginners seeking an all-in-one marketing suite, while Omnisend specializes in e-commerce with integrated SMS and omnichannel automation. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns best with your business needs and budget.

comparison_table.tool_a: Email, drag-drop editor, automation, landing pages, A/B testing
comparison_table.tool_b: Email, SMS, push notifications, omnichannel automation, product picker

choose_a_if: You're a beginner or small business looking for an affordable, general-purpose marketing platform
You need landing pages and want an all-in-one solution without additional channels
You prioritize a larger free tier with up to 500 subscribers for testing
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce business and want to combine email, SMS, and push notifications
You need pre-built workflows and advanced segmentation for targeted campaigns
You value customer reviews and want a platform with strong Trustpilot ratings (4.6/5 vs 1.5/5)

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Mailchimp excels for beginners and general marketing with a stronger free tier, while Omnisend is superior for e-commerce businesses wanting integrated SMS and omnichannel capabilities. Omnisend has higher customer satisfaction ratings on Trustpilot, but Mailchimp remains a solid choice for budget-conscious startups.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Omnisend?
faq.a: Mailchimp is slightly cheaper at $13/month compared to Omnisend's $16/month for paid plans. However, Mailchimp's free tier accommodates 500 subscribers versus Omnisend's 250, making Mailchimp better for those wanting to stay on the free plan longer. The actual cost depends on your subscriber count and feature needs.

faq.q: Can I switch from Omnisend to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your contact lists and campaign data. Most email marketing platforms support standard CSV exports, making migration relatively straightforward. However, you may need to manually recreate automations and workflows, as they don't always transfer directly between platforms.
